metadata.description: Personal AI coding assistant skills collection

plugins.name: smart-commit
plugins.description: Smart Git commit assistant with submodule awareness. Generates Chinese Conventional Commits messages, runs safety checks, and creates signed commits.

plugins.name: sdk-assistant-agent
plugins.description: ARCS SDK 开发助手统一入口。自动路由驱动开发、构建调试、样例生成、组件开发、代码审查、文档编写等任务。
